posts.text:
The Dept. of Ed just announced that it will transfer more responsibilities for college loans to Treasury, simplifying the lending process and further winding down the department.

Heritage Policy Analyst Madison Doan and @JM_Butcher have the details! dailysignal.com/2026/03/19/e…

posts.text: SHUT IT DOWN: Today, the Trump administration took another major step toward shutting down the Department of Education by shifting all student loan collections to the Treasury Department—a move that will streamline loan administration by placing it with the agency already equipped to handle large‑scale federal debt collection.

posts.text: For decades, Heritage has called for the dissolution of the Education Department and has recommended this specific move since 2020! heritage.org/education/repor…

posts.text:
NEW: The Trump administration just took another major step towards shutting down the Department of Education by shifting all student loan collections and other essential activities the agency can share under law to the Treasury Department.
